title: 更好的铁匠铺(Better weaponsmith)
description: Changed the original tiny weaponsmith.更改了原版小小的铁匠铺。
body:
原版的铁匠铺太小了，为了为了使铁匠铺更大、更美观，所以更改了铁匠铺的NBT文件。

制作不易，赞助一下吧 爱发电：https://afdian.com/a/CODEZPC?tab=home

有BUG？发送电子邮件到**zpcpy@outlook.com**，或QQ号：2682389781。

The original weaponsmith was too small, so in order to in order to make the weaponsmith bigger and more beautiful, the NBT file for the weaponsmith was changed.

There is a Bug? Sent an email to **zpcpy@outlook.com**.
